description: Multiple use cases in production serving a department or line of business. Supports concurrent workloads and growing model portfolios.
useCases: Production fraud management with alert triage
Credit scoring and risk models in production
hadrNotes: Multi-AZ recommended. Active-passive failover. RPO <4hr, RTO <1hr.
cloudVsOnprem: Cloud preferred for elasticity and burst capacity. On-prem viable if existing data center capacity is available.
typicalCustomers: Universal banks (risk/fraud teams), telco analytics departments, large insurers, retail chains
